title: Shea Dugger
compiled_truth: Shea Dugger is an external contact at [I2](companies/i2). Over the corpus period (2000-10-09 to 2001-10-17), Shea Dugger sent 10 and received 13 emails, totalling 23 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kenneth Lay](people/kenneth-lay) (8), [Tom Meredith](people/tom-meredith-dell) (7), [Jdavidson](people/jdavidson-srfunds) (6), [Kelly Landgraf](people/kelly-landgraf-dell) (6), [Heather Dalton](people/heather-dalton-dell) (6).
